name: Fretwork
description: Open fretwork of crossing lines with small bosses at the junctions.

code.style: --rule: ( margin: -0.5px; @random(${shapeFrequency}) { border-top: @pick(6px, 10px) solid @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); } @random(${shapeFrequency}) { border-left: @pick(6px, 10px) solid @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); } @random(0.18) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 26%; left: 37%; top: 37%; border-radius: @pick(0, 50%); background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
